client_authentication.description: Defines the client authentication method for the MSK Serverless cluster, specifying how clients connect securely.

cluster_name.description: Name of the MSK Serverless cluster. Must be unique within the AWS account and region.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to associate with the cluster for categorization and organization.

timeouts.description: Defines timeout durations for create, update, and delete operations on the MSK serverless cluster.

vpc_config.description: Configuration specifying the subnets and security groups for the cluster's VPC connectivity. Must include at least two subnets in different availability zones.
